name: Granola Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a saucepan, heat juice until warm. Add margarine and raisins. Turn off heat when margarine is melted and let cool. When cooled, beat in egg.
3. Combine dry ingredients except granola. Stir apple juice mixture into dry ingredients. Gently stir in crushed granola and mix in uniformly.
4. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
5. Bake for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned on bottom. Remove from oven and cool on wire rack.
